steps.title: Use the parallel-line angle rule
steps.content: The angles labeled $x$ and $y$ are same-side interior angles formed by a transversal crossing parallel lines. Same-side interior angles are supplementary.

steps.title: Apply the given inequality
steps.content: $$x+y=180$$$$y=180-x$$Because $x\gt100$, subtracting $x$ from $180$ gives a value less than $80$. Therefore $y\lt80$ must be true, while the sum remains exactly $180$. That also rules out any option claiming the sum is less than or greater than $180$. The answer is A.
